reviews.comment:
Hoy fui 5 AM. El playero no salía. Tuve que tocar bocina varias veces. Cuando me atendió me dijo solo efectivo y no me hizo el descuento de socia de Aca y no me cargó los puntos. Y lo peor NO me dio el ticket. Pésimo servicio. Pongan a alguien  que tenga ganas de trabajar.

(Translated by Google)
I went at 5 AM today. The attendant wasn't coming out. I had to honk several times. When he finally helped me, he said cash only and didn't give me the ACA member discount or credit my points. And the worst part? He didn't give me a receipt. Terrible service. Hire someone who actually wants to work.

reviews.comment:
Quedada en el tiempo, te salva pero falta que se actualice. No entendí que el playero se haya negado a emitirme factura A diciendo que “el ACA no permite emitir factura A” siendo que uso el vehículo para trabajo y siempre que cargo pido. He ido a otras estaciones de servicio de ACA y si me emitieron. Con ese criterio me tendrían que descontar el IVA que me cobraron y no puedo recuperar. Tampoco está bueno que te cobren el aire, debería ser una cordialidad incluida en el valor del servicio. A revisar eso gente, no me sirve volver en ese caso.

(Translated by Google)
It's a time-tested service, but it needs updating. I didn't understand why the gas station attendant refused to issue me an A invoice, saying that "ACA doesn't allow issuing A invoices," even though I use the vehicle for work and I always ask for fuel. I've been to other ACA gas stations, and they did issue them. Based on that criterion, they would have to deduct the VAT they charged me, which I can't get back. Charging for air conditioning isn't good either; it should be a courtesy included in the service price. People, check that out; there's no point in coming back in that case.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2paYU9FdzVjWFJ3V25OM1lWZ3lNM015ZGtKeFowRRAB
